Inside that board will contain customers list.
Set billing recurrent reminder from board to a specific Discussion of Rocke…

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, please could anyone share how can build below scene?

  1. Create board of billing in monday.com
  2. Inside that board will contain customers list.
  3. Set billing recurrent reminder from board to a specific Discussion of Rocket.chat, one customer for one Discussion.

Thanks in advance

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Kmk

First, I would recommend creating a CRM board that includes your customers and their contact information: monday.com as a CRM

From there, you can use the Quotes & Invoices app to manage billing for those customers.

If you specifically want to link this information with a different system like Rocket.chat, something you can try would be to use one of our 3rd party platform integrations to build your own integration with that system:

  • How to create an integration using Zapier

  • How to create an automation or integration with Integromat

Otherwise, if you are comfortable coding or have access to any developers, you can build your own integration using our API:

  • Does monday.com have an API?

If you need additional support on our APIs or apps platform, I would recommend doing a search for your question in our developer community here. You can also post to the community to get help from other monday.com developers.

If you need help building custom integrations, we also have an option for paid assistance through our network of certified monday.com partners. If this interests you, simply fill out this form and someone will be in touch shortly!

As for sending notifications to your customers, we have a few different integrations with different systems that will allow you to contact people external to your account. Here’s a few examples:

  • Twilio Integration
  • How to send or receive emails with monday.com

You can also check the marketplace for other systems we might have an app for already: The monday apps marketplace

You can also refer to this article for internal notifications: Alerts and Reminders with Automations

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml:
